title: Pizza Gapples
description: This pack replaces golden apples with pizza! 🍕
body:
# Introducing Pizza Gapples! This lightweight texture pack replaces golden apples with delicious-looking pizzas! Perfect for anyone who wants a small, fun change without overhauling the whole game. Now when you chow down on a golden apple, it’s a cheesy slice of power instead! Golden Apple → Pizza
Enchanted Golden Apple → Shiny pizza Works great with any other texture pack — just load it on top! # Support or Issues? If you have any problems, feature suggestions or other you can join my helpful Discord.
